tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results show mild hypoglycemia, slightly elevated chloride, borderline high LDL cholesterol, and low HDL cholesterol. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile, are within normal limits. The low HDL and high LDL suggest increased cardiovascular risk. No evidence of renal impairment or significant metabolic disturbance. Clinical correlation is recommended.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
